details.test: Task 1: Upgrade to cheapest plan with >=2 streams under $25
Task 2: Add cheapest sports add-on with soccer under $10
Task 3: Create favorites with HD news channels
Task 4: Create kids profile with parental controls and PIN
Task 5: Schedule recordings for movies starting after 6 PM
Task 6: Remove oldest device and rename another to Bedroom-TV
Task 7: Build watchlist with 4+ star titles from 2019+
Task 8: Set Spanish audio and English subtitles defaults and apply in playback
Task 9: Configure notifications (disable promotions, enable billing SMS)
